Filippo Falciatore

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Hercules and Lichas
by Filippo Falciatore
Italy · 1738–1768 · Black chalk with pen and brown ink and brush and blue-green wash on pieced ivory laid paper
←Wedgwood Factory Etienne-Maurice Falconet→
